scripts.clean: cargo clean && git clean -fdf .turbo node_modules target && rm -rf ./web/dist && rm -rf ./nodejs/dist
scripts.build: wasm-pack build --dev --target bundler --out-dir ./web/dist & wasm-pack build --dev --target nodejs --out-dir ./nodejs/dist
scripts.release: wasm-pack build --release --target bundler --out-dir ./web/dist & wasm-pack build --release --target nodejs --out-dir ./nodejs/dist
